name: Hospitality Worker — Undeclared Tips, CPT20 Election, and Canada Training Credit
description: Complete Mateo Vargas's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vargas\. Save the completed return as 'mateo_vargas.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form CPT20; CRA Canada Training Credit guidelines
metadata.key_complexity: Direct tips entry (Line 10400) separate from T4 Box 14; Form CPT20 election to pay CPP on tips; Canada Training Credit claim using prior NOA limit
